login.description: Monitor efficiency, manage your fleet, and export professional reports in one seamless mobile experience.
login.error: Failed to sign in. Please try again.

stations.title: Fuel Stations
stations.errorLoading: Failed to load fuel stations. Please try again.
stations.noStationsFound: No fuel stations found with logged entries. Log some fuel with location data!
stations.selectStationPrompt: Select a station from the left to view details.

stationDetail.notEnoughDataForChart: Not enough data to display chart (at least 2 logs needed).
stationDetail.noLogsFound: No fuel logs found for this station.
stationDetail.errorLoading: Failed to load station details. Please try again.
stationDetail.noLocationData: No location data available for this station.

noVehicles.heading: No vehicles found
noVehicles.subtext: You need at least one vehicle to start logging fuel.

fields.odometerHintBaseline: First odometer entry for this vehicle. Enter distance manually to establish a baseline.
fields.odometerErrorLower: Odometer must be greater than previous ({{last}} Km).

messages.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to save.
messages.addVehicleFirst: Please add a vehicle in your Profile first.
messages.fillRequired: Please fill in Cost, Distance, and Fuel Amount.
messages.validNumbers: Cost, Distance (Km), and Fuel Amount must be valid positive numbers.
messages.saveError: Couldn't save your log: {{detail}}. Please try again.
messages.receiptUploadWarning: Your receipt photo couldn't be uploaded, so the log was saved without it.
messages.stationLookupWarning: Couldn't look up a nearby station, so this log wasn't linked to one.
messages.stationMetricsWarning: Your log was saved, but the station's price stats couldn't be updated.
messages.fetchRateError: Failed to fetch {{currency}} rate. Please set manually.
messages.invalidDate: Please enter a valid date and time.
messages.futureDate: The fuelling date/time cannot be in the future.

location.none: No location yet — adjust on map to set one.

history.title: Fuel History
history.noLogs: No fuel logs found. Add your first entry!
history.noLogsForFilter: No logs match the current filters.

charts.costPerLitreOverTime: Fuel Cost Per Litre Over Time (Filtered)
charts.needMoreData: Need at least two logs in the filtered range to show trends.

edit.title: Edit Log Entry
edit.receiptKept: Current receipt will be kept unless replaced.
edit.invalidDate: Please enter a valid date and time.
edit.futureDate: The date/time cannot be in the future.

delete.confirm: Delete this log entry? This action cannot be undone.

history.loadError: Failed to load fuel history. Please check your connection and try again.
history.deleteError: Failed to delete log entry. Please try again.
history.updateError: Failed to update log. Please try again.

profile.homeCurrencyDesc: Set your primary currency for all fuel logs and summary analytics.
profile.monthlyBudgetDesc: Set an optional monthly fuel spend budget to get alerted at 80% and 100%.
profile.measurementUnitsSoon: Coming soon: Toggle between Metric (Km/L) and Imperial (MPG) defaults.

dataImport.heading: Data Import
dataImport.description: Already tracking fuel elsewhere? Import your past logs from a CSV file.

maintenance.heading: Maintenance
maintenance.migrateStationsDesc: Analyze your historical logs to identify and link them to known petrol stations based on coordinates.

profile.noActiveVehiclesSubtext: Add a vehicle below to start tracking.

messages.failedToAdd: Failed to add vehicle. Please try again.
messages.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Please check Firestore security rules.
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This won't delete logs but will un-link them.

notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.weeklyDigestDesc: Push notification every Monday with your weekly fuel summary.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notifications are blocked for this site in your browser settings. Enable them in your browser's site permissions, then try again.

receipt.extractionFailed: Failed to extract data from receipt.

import.title: Import Fuel Logs

noVehicles.heading: No active vehicles found.
noVehicles.subtext: You need an active vehicle to import logs.

fields.targetVehicleDesc: All logs in the file will be assigned to this vehicle.

import.description: Select a Tab-Separated Value (.tsv or .txt) file. Ensure headers include: Date, Litres, Total Cost, Garage, and Distance since fueled (in Km).

messages.fileAndLoginRequired: Please select a TSV file and ensure you are logged in.
messages.selectVehicle: Please select a vehicle for this import.
messages.noLogs: No valid logs found to import after parsing.
messages.minRows: File must contain at least a header row and one data row.
messages.foundErrors: Found {{count}} errors during parsing. First few: {{errors}}

importOnboarding.heading: Import your existing fuel logs
importOnboarding.description: Already tracking fuel elsewhere? Import your past logs from a CSV file in a few clicks.

apiTokens.title: API Access
apiTokens.subtitle: Connect Claude and other LLMs to your fuel data via MCP
apiTokens.noTokensSubtext: Generate a token to connect Claude Desktop or any MCP-compatible LLM to your Fuelog data.

reveal.title: API Token Created
reveal.warning: This token will not be shown again. Copy it now.
reveal.configDesc: Add this to your claude_desktop_config.json under mcpServers.

errors.enterName: Please enter a name for this token.
errors.selectScope: Select at least one permission scope.
errors.failedCreate: Failed to create token. Please try again.
errors.permissionDenied: Permission denied — Firestore rules for the apiTokens collection may not be deployed yet. See docs/MCP.md for setup instructions.

about.title: About Fuel Tracker
about.description: Fuel Tracker is a web app that helps you track your fuel consumption and costs.

features.import: Import fuel logs from a CSV file
